name: Japanese Style Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 large Sandwich slices of ham (cut into small squares)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil unpeeled potatoes until tender.
2. Cut cucumber lengthwise, remove seeds, and slice thinly. Place in a bowl and add salt.
3. Slice onion thinly and soak in cold water until ready to use.
4. Remove skins from cooked potatoes and cut into pieces about 1 inch wide.
5. Drain the cucumber and onions well.
6. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl. Add apple slices if desired for added flavor.
7. This potato salad closely resembles the style you might find in Japan.
